title: Supreme Court declines to entertain plea against IT Act provisions allowing tax raids without notice, digital device seizure
description: The Supreme Court on Monday declined to entertain a petition challenging provisions of the Income Tax Act, 2025, which empower tax authorities to conduct raids without notice and search not only physical spaces but also private computer systems and virtual digital spaces while probing suspected tax evasion cases [Vishwaprasad Alva Vs. Union Of India].A Bench comprising Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi was hearing a public interest litigation (PIL) petition chal
